name: memobox
description: Model-readable memory store using the MemoBox CLI.

interface.longDescription: Use MemoBox skills to inspect index-first JSON memory stores, read Memory Mail bodies and traces, write records, and curate local-first memory data through the existing memobox CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use MemoBox to inspect the project memory index.
Use MemoBox to write one memory record.
Use MemoBox to curate duplicate memories.
